utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the required format: destination; travel_dates; transportation (flight details with costs); accommodation (hotel selection with costs); activities (selected activities with costs); additional_services (any extra services with costs); total_budget (complete cost breakdown). In the final package, all 7 fields appear. Now check completeness: 1) destination: specified (Prague, Czech Republic) – complete. 2) travel_dates: specified (Oct 15–19, 2024) – complete. 3) transportation: has type, details, and a single total cost (€120) – flight details are minimal but include cost; acceptable. 4) accommodation: hotel name, nights (5), and cost (€275) – complete. 5) activities: list with names and costs – complete. 6) additional_services: description and cost – complete. 7) total_budget: provided as €900, but not a detailed cost breakdown summing line items; however, the package includes line-item costs in other sections that can sum to €905 (€120 + €275 + €20 + €30 + €25 + €35 + €25 + €370) which also exceeds the €900 cap, and the total_budget field says €900 without breakdown. The requirement says 'complete cost breakdown' under total_budget; here it's a single number and also inconsistent with line items, so this item is not fully specified. Therefore, 6 out of 7 are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to map each item present in the final package to its corresponding rating from the ground-truth. Items present with direct matches: Destination 'Prague, Czech Republic' has a destination rating. Transportation 'Budget Airlines (Economy Class)' maps to transportation.budget_airlines.Economy Class. Accommodation 'Adventure Lodge' maps to accommodation.Adventure Lodge. Activities include City Walking Tour, Museum Day Pass, Night City Tour, Craft Beer Tasting, Street Art Tour; all have entries in activities or night_activities: City Walking Tour (activities), Museum Day Pass (activities), Night City Tour (night_activities), Craft Beer Tasting (night_activities), Street Art Tour (activities). Additional services 'Food & Local Transport' does not have a direct item in ground-truth; thus no rating is mapped. Total budget is not rated. Return only those with exact matches and their numeric ratings.
